steps.title: Niyyah (Intention)
steps.description: Stand facing the Qibla and make the intention in your heart for the prayer you are about to perform.

steps.title: Takbiratul Ihram
steps.description: Raise your hands to your ears (men) or shoulders (women) and say 'Allahu Akbar'.

steps.title: Qiyam - Sana
steps.description: Recite the opening supplication (Sana).
steps.arabicText: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ ، وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ ، وَتَعَالَى جَدُّكَ ، وَلَا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ

steps.title: Qiyam - Surah Al-Fatiha
steps.description: Recite the opening Surah of the Quran. It is mandatory in every Rakat.
steps.arabicText: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ... الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ...

steps.title: Qiyam - Additional Surah
steps.description: Recite any other Surah or at least three verses from the Quran (e.g., Surah Al-Ikhlas).
steps.arabicText: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ. قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ. اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ. لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ. وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ

steps.title: Ruku (Bowing)
steps.description: Say 'Allahu Akbar' and bow down. Recite 'Subhana Rabbiyal Azeem' three times.

steps.title: Sujud (Prostration)
steps.description: Say 'Allahu Akbar' and prostrate. Recite 'Subhana Rabbiyal الأَعْلَى' three times.

steps.title: Tashahhud
steps.description: Sitting after two or four Rakats, recite the Attahiyat.

steps.title: Durood-e-Ibrahim
steps.description: Recite blessings upon the Prophet (PBUH) in the final Rakat.
steps.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ...

steps.title: Final Dua
steps.description: Recite a supplication before ending the prayer.
steps.arabicText: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ

steps.title: Tasleem (Salam)
steps.description: Turn your head to the right and then to the left saying 'Assalamu Alaikum wa Rahmatullah'.

steps.title: 1st Takbir
steps.description: Say 'Allahu Akbar' and recite Sana and Surah Al-Fatiha.

steps.title: 2nd Takbir
steps.description: Say 'Allahu Akbar' and recite Durood-e-Ibrahim.
steps.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ...

steps.title: 3rd Takbir
steps.description: Say 'Allahu Akbar' and recite the Dua for the deceased.
steps.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِحَيِّنَا وَمَيِّتِنَا وَشَاهِدِنَا وَغَائِبِنَا وَصَغِيرِنَا وَكَبِيرِنَا وَذَكَرِنَا وَأُنْثَانَا...

steps.title: 4th Takbir
steps.description: Say 'Allahu Akbar' and then perform Tasleem (Salam) to the right and left.

steps.title: Niyyah & Bismillah
steps.description: Make intention and say Bismillah.

steps.title: Washing Hands
steps.description: Wash both hands up to the wrists three times.

steps.title: Rinsing Mouth
steps.description: Rinse the mouth three times.

steps.title: Cleaning Nose
steps.description: Clean the nose by sniffing water three times.

steps.title: Washing Face
steps.description: Wash the entire face three times.

steps.title: Washing Arms
steps.description: Wash both arms up to and including the elbows three times.

steps.title: Masah
steps.description: Wipe the head and ears once with wet hands.

steps.title: Washing Feet
steps.description: Wash both feet up to and including the ankles three times.
